calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan L. Dahm of the law offices of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC (415-989-4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC A CORPORATION's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, restraining order, and turnover order as to judgment debtor Marvin Ngwafon is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (L&M302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Off Calendar

Second Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Second Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc. is Off Calendar. Duplicate Entry. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Continued To Sep-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc. is continued to September 27, 2017 to be heard on the law and motion calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc. is continued for hearing on September 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302, Discovery, per the moving party's Second Notice of Motion and to give the opportunity for the parties to comply with Local Rule 2.7. The Court has not yet received courtesy copies of the papers. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
